name: Project Alpha
description: A research project focused on developing novel architectures for visual recognition. Achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks.

name: Project Beta
description: An end-to-end system for real-time object detection and tracking in video streams using efficient neural architectures.

name: Project Gamma
description: A multimodal learning framework that combines vision and language for visual question answering and captioning.

name: Project Delta
description: A tooling library for efficient model training and deployment. Provides utilities for data loading, augmentation, and distributed training.
